description: On /t/personal_mwiasvikdmkwinfh/documents/envelope_tmdiotunmyndrtuk/edit, entering an international email like Søren@gmail.com in the signer email input field does not show a client-side email validation error.
steps: Fill the element with data-testid 'signer-email-input' with 'Søren@gmail.com'
Press Tab to move focus away from the email input
Wait 2 seconds for any validation errors to appear
